rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Assumptions and guarantees for subcomponent ports should be expressed using visible variables or outputs, not direct port references
generic_rules: Component type contracts should only include assumptions and guarantees with concrete bounds or named constants
Use visible feature names and legal identifiers when defining AGREE contracts
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must use valid AADL scope rules: type scopes for component contracts, implementation scopes for bindings
Boolean expressions in AGREE should use proper comparison operators with matching types
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level AGREE contracts in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation
